transcript: Spring cleaning, huh? Jim, hi, how are you? It's a lot of recycling. Do you think it'll fit in the bin? Don't know yet. Oh, my God. Thank you for watching.

timestamps.text: Spring cleaning, huh? Jim, hi, how are you?
It's a lot of recycling. Do you think it'll fit in the bin?

Won't. I don't know what you're talking about. Go get help,! Missy, go! Hey Jim, do you want me to water your... Oh, my God. Thank you for watching.
